# @amit-t/skill-grill-me

> Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan, get grilled on their design, or mentions "grill me".

**Category:** engineering

## Install

```bash
npx @amit-t/skill-grill-me
```

This installs the skill to your Devin for Terminal global skills directory (`~/.config/cognition/skills/grill-me/`).

## Usage

Once installed, use in any Devin for Terminal session:

```
/grill-me
```

## What is this?

This is a [Devin for Terminal](https://devin.ai) skill — a reusable prompt/workflow that teaches the AI agent how to perform a specific task. Skills are defined as `SKILL.md` files and can be invoked by name.

## Uninstall

```bash
rm -rf ~/.config/cognition/skills/grill-me
```
